ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city_state_zip" TEXT /* City, state, and zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "zip_code_found" INTEGER /* Zip code found in the address (for data integrity checks) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store for geolocation purposes */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store for geolocation purposes */,
  "store_size" INTEGER /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, standard, outlet) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate" (
  "real_estate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate entry */,
  "store_number" TEXT /* Reference to the store */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Lease start date for the store */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Lease end date for the store */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Rent amount for the store */,
  "property_owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the property owner */,
  "lease_area" INTEGER /* Area of the leased property in square feet */,
  "lease_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the lease (e.g., 5-year lease with 2 renewals) */,
  "lease_status" TEXT /* Current status of the lease (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_estate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_store_number FOREIGN KEY ("store_number") REFERENCES stores ("store_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation entry */,
  "store_number" TEXT /* Reference to the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store opening hours */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Store closing hours */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees working at the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "shifts" INTEGER /* Number of shifts per day */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees (including part-time and full-time) */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of hours worked by all employees in a week */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Special hours for holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_store_number FOREIGN KEY ("store_number") REFERENCES stores ("store_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing" (
  "marketing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "store_number" TEXT /* Reference to the store */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the marketing campaign */,
  "estimated_reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the marketing campaign */,
  "actual_reach" INTEGER /* Actual reach of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_store_number FOREIGN KEY ("store_number") REFERENCES stores ("store_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "store_number" TEXT /* Reference to the store */,
  "sales_data" REAL /* Sales data for the store */,
  "foot_traffic" INTEGER /* Customer foot traffic count */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "daily_sales" REAL /* Daily sales data */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Weekly sales data */,
  "monthly_sales" REAL /* Monthly sales data */,
  "yearly_sales" REAL /* Yearly sales data */,
  "average_foot_traffic" REAL /* Average daily foot traffic */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of customer traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_store_number FOREIGN KEY ("store_number") REFERENCES stores ("store_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate manager, operations manager, marketing manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "store_number" TEXT /* Reference to the store */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the store information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the store information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_store_number FOREIGN KEY ("store_number") REFERENCES stores ("store_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
